Kadir Has University

International Trade and Finance

Kadir Has University Department of International Trade and Finance offers students an in-depth understanding of the dynamics of the global economy and financial markets. The department, which provides education in English, is a member of the CFA Institute's University Affiliation Programme (UAP) and offers international standards of education in financial analysis and investment expertise. Students have the opportunity to put their theoretical knowledge into practice through lectures and seminars supported by professional tools such as Bloomberg Terminal and EIKON Datastream. Graduates have career opportunities in various fields such as financial institutions, multinational companies and research centres.
